title: Create admin dashboard page
description: New src/pages/admin.tsx: dense all-in-one page with all trophies. Each trophy section has heading with anchor ID, winner summary, expandable ranked results list with per-entry copy buttons and BGA verification links. TOC at top. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 5.

title: Simplify public home page to clean leaderboard
description: Strip index.tsx down to clean trophy table (name link, winner, score per row). Remove CopyButton/WinnerDetails inline details. Wrap in PageLayout, add Stats card styling, add admin gear icon link. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 2.

title: Add trophyNav helper for prev/next navigation
description: Create src/lib/trophyNav.ts with getTrophyNav(id) returning {current, prev, next} Trophy objects. TDD: write tests first in test/lib/trophyNav.test.ts. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 3.

title: Visual foundation: theme tokens and PageLayout
description: Set up Cambridge blue/teal accent color in Tailwind v4 globals.css (@theme tokens), create PageLayout wrapper component (max-w-4xl, bg-gray-50), update Loading spinner to use PageLayout and teal accent. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 1.

title: Update trophy detail page with nav and copy button
description: Add next/prev trophy navigation bar to [trophyId].tsx, add copy button on winner row, remove TrophyImage component, wrap in PageLayout, apply card styling. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 4.

title: Remove stub /season/[season]/trophy/[trophy] route
description: Delete src/pages/season/[season]/trophy/[trophy].tsx (renders raw JSON, uses non-existent API). Verify no references exist. Run build to confirm. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 7.

title: Polish Season picker and error components
description: Update Season.tsx with Cambridge teal hover colors. Wrap FlightLoadFailure.tsx and UnknownTrophy.tsx in PageLayout with styled content. See docs/plans/2026-02-20-user-flow-implementation.md Task 6.
